EN.literal_index_text: Hmph, you certainly seem to be in a jolly mood. I suppose I should be thankful.

…ふっ、生き生きとした声だな

EN.literal_index_text: Give me charge of the soldiers and make good your escape. I will handle the rearguard, my lord. It has been an honor...

JP.literal_index_text:
では、それがしに殿軍はお任せあれ
…これにてお別れでござる！

SC.literal_index_text:
那就请把士兵交给我，快撤退吧。
由我来断后……永别了。

TC.literal_index_text:
那麼請將士兵託付給我，您先行撤退吧。
殿軍的任務就交給我……再會了！

records.direct_pc_jp:
では、それがしに殿軍はお任せあれ

records.rationale: restore 殿軍 and farewell; remove unsupported withdrawal instruction
